language.title: Language
settings.watch_folders.title: Watch Folders
settings.watch_folders.desc: Watch folders monitor for new images you create. Add your VRChat screenshot folder here. You can also add folders from apps like VHF (VR Hands Frame) to track world location and friends list for those images too.
settings.launch.title: VRChat Launch Options
settings.launch.additional_apps_desc: Apps to launch alongside VRChat when you click "Play VRChat". Useful for OVR Advanced Settings, SlimeVR, VRCFaceTracking, and similar tools.
settings.api.title: VRChat API Login
settings.api.desc: Your credentials are stored locally and only used to connect to the VRChat API. VRCNext never shares them with third parties.
settings.sounds.title: Sounds
settings.sounds.notifications_desc: Plays a sound when you receive a new notification such as friend requests, invites and more.
settings.sounds.messages_desc: Plays a sound when you get a boop or when someone sends you a message through the VRCN Messenger.
settings.sounds.media_relay_desc: Plays a sound when Media Relay successfully sends an image to one of your Discord channels.
settings.sounds.overlay_desc: Plays a sound when a notification toast appears in the SteamVR overlay.
settings.design.title: Design
settings.design.random_background: Random background from watch folders on launch
settings.debug.title: Debugging
settings.debug.desc: Use these options if something isn't working correctly or you want to reconfigure VRCNext from scratch.
settings.debug.text_tools.label: Enable Text Tools
settings.debug.text_tools.desc: When enabled, all text in VRCNext becomes selectable. You can copy it via the right-click context menu or with Ctrl + C.
settings.debug.legacy_window.label: Enable Legacy Window
settings.debug.legacy_window.desc: When enabled, VRCNext uses the Legacy Window Manager with native title bar controls. The sidebar color is applied to the title bar.
settings.debug.legacy_window.restart_hin: A restart is required to apply the window mode change.
settings.image_cache.title: Image Cache
settings.image_cache.desc: VRCNext caches avatar, world, and profile images locally for instant loading. Over time this can grow to several gigabytes. Set a limit and the oldest cached images will be removed automatically when it is reached (~2 GB per cleanup pass).
settings.image_cache.limit_hint: When the limit is reached, the oldest ~2 GB of cached images are removed automatically.
settings.image_cache.optimize.label: Optimize Caching
settings.image_cache.optimize.desc: PNG images > 1.5 MB are compressed to JPEG automatically
settings.ffc.title: Fast Fetch Cache
settings.ffc.desc: Fast Fetch Cache stores user profiles, worlds, groups, and avatars locally to improve load times. When enabled, VRCNext instantly shows cached content (descriptions, texts, images) while silently refreshing it in the background. When disabled, all data is freshly downloaded on every request with no cache stored or used.
settings.avtrdb.title: Avtrdb Community Support
settings.avtrdb.support.deleted_desc: Help improve the avtrdb avatar database by reporting deleted avatars. When enabled, VRCNext will notify avtrdb whenever you encounter a deleted or DMCA'd avatar. This helps keep the database clean and up to date for everyone.
settings.avtrdb.support.submit_desc: Submit new public avatars you encounter in-game to the avtrdb database. When you switch to an avatar that isn't indexed yet, VRCNext will automatically submit it. This helps expand the database and makes more avatars discoverable for everyone.
settings.avtrdb.reports.desc: All reports sent to avtrdb during this session. Click a ticket to check its status.
settings.avtrdb.reports.empty: No reports sent yet this session.
settings.vrcx.title: Import data from VRCX
settings.vrcx.desc: Imports your VRCX history into VRCNext: world time, friend time, instance joins, GPS events, online/offline, status and bio changes. Existing data is preserved and values are added on top. Select your VRCX.sqlite3 file to begin.
settings.vrcx.desc_prefix: Imports your VRCX history into VRCNext: world time, friend time, instance joins, GPS events, online/offline, status and bio changes. Existing data is preserved and values are added on top. Select your
settings.vrcx.warning.title: Experimental Feature
settings.vrcx.warning.line1: Importing the VRCX database will only add necessary information. This feature is highly experimental and some data may be missing. Instance information works differently in VRCN, so some images or other details might not appear.
settings.vrcx.warning.line2: If your VRCX database is very important to you, it is recommended to continue using VRCX, as the data will not be fully merged with the VRCN database.
settings.vrcx.warning.line3: Full instance data will not be available and some elements may not display correctly.
settings.vrcx.success.summary: {worlds} worlds, {friends} friends, {joins} joins, {friend_events} friend events, {meets} meets

groups.roles.permissions.group-roles-ass: Assign or unassign roles to users. Requires Manage Group Member Data.
groups.roles.permissions.group-bans-mana: Ban or unban users and view all banned users. Requires Manage Group Member Data.
groups.roles.permissions.group-members-r: Remove someone from the group. Requires Manage Group Member Data.
groups.roles.permissions.group-members-v: View all members in the group, not just friends.
groups.roles.permissions.group-announcem: Set or clear the group announcement and send it as a notification.
groups.roles.permissions.group-calendar-: Create, modify, and publish calendar entries.
groups.roles.permissions.group-galleries: Create, reorder, edit, and delete group galleries.
groups.roles.permissions.group-invites-m: Create or cancel invites, accept, decline, or block join requests.
groups.roles.permissions.group-instance-: Rename or close a group instance.

permini.title: Permini
permini.desc: Friends on this list will automatically receive an invite to your current instance when they send an invite request.
permini.desc2: For Invite-Only instances, this only works if they are the instance owner. For all other instance types, they can invite you.
permini.important.title: Important
permini.important.text: Do Not Disturb invite requests only work when using VRCNext or VRCX. Invite requests cannot be sent through VRChat or the website in this case, because they are blocked there. So if your friend wants to join you while your status is set to Do Not Disturb, they must use VRCNext or VRCX.
permini.toggle.active_title: Auto-invite when status is Active / Online
permini.toggle.askme_title: Auto-invite when status is Ask Me
permini.toggle.dnd_title: Auto-invite when status is Do Not Disturb
